Remento.ad_copy: Want to capture your loved one's life story without the hassle of writing and typing? Introducing Remento! Tim Ferriss chose it for his mom, calling it an "A+ investment!" • 80% of life stories are never recorded - don't let that be yours!
Remento.headline: Give Remento as a gift & turn memories into a stunning interactive book.

Remento.ad_copy: If you’re looking for a meaningful gift for a parent or grandparent, I highly recommend Remento. I was honestly surprised by how much it impacted me when I received the finished book. The quality is incredible—the binding, the glossy photos, the overall feel of it. It doesn’t feel like just another photo book. It feels personal. It feels real. One of the things I love most is that it captures stories, memories, advice, and even voice recordings, creating something future generations can treasure.
Most families have boxes of old photos sitting in closets, attics, or drawers. That’s why we love this partnership: 📸 Legacybox helps digitize and preserve old family photos.
Remento.headline: 🎙️ Remento captures the stories behind those photos - in your loved one’s own voice.

Remento.ad_copy: Sometimes you don’t realize how much you want family stories saved until you’re watching your own babies make memories with the people you love most. One of the most special parts of becoming a mom has been watching my twin boys with their grandfather… my Baba. I always knew I wanted Hudson and Caspian to grow up knowing his stories from the funny ones, the untold ones from his life Iran, and the ones that shaped who he is. That’s why Remento feels so meaningful to me. It makes it easy to capture those stories in his own voice, so one day my boys can hear them straight from Baba 🩵 #RementoPartner @getremento

ElliQ.ad_copy: What if the way we think about aging actually impacts how we age? The research suggests it does. Positive aging isn’t just a mindset. It can shape real outcomes. That's why ElliQ focuses on helping people feel capable, connected, active, and engaged every day. The goal isn’t just helping people age at home.
ElliQ.headline: It’s helping them continue to thrive there ✨

ElliQ.ad_copy: Because no one should feel alone. ElliQ is more than technology - she’s a companion who’s there every day to talk, laugh, and brighten your little moments. From sharing stories to telling jokes, ElliQ brings connection, comfort, and smiles right into your home.
ElliQ.headline: ✨ A friendly voice
